# Click2Call

> Click2Call is an Australian business communications provider specialising in AI-enhanced Cloud PBX, VoIP, and SIP Trunking services. We help businesses of all sizes across Australia to modernise their phone systems, reduce costs, and improve customer interactions with intelligent voice tools. Operated by Bcom Services Pty Ltd (ABN: 92 636 893 108).

## Core Services

- **Cloud PBX**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/cloud-pbx.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/cloud-pbx.html) — A fully-featured, hardware-free business phone system hosted in the cloud. Includes auto-attendant, call recording, voicemail-to-email, ring groups, and business hours routing.
- **AI Voice Tools**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-voice-tools.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-voice-tools.html) — Tools for real-time call transcription, sentiment analysis, AI-powered call summaries, and smart routing.
- **AI Receptionist**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-receptionist.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-receptionist.html) — A 24/7 conversational AI that answers, routes, and handles inbound calls using natural language.
- **Microsoft Teams Calling**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/microsoft-teams-calling.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/microsoft-teams-calling.html) — Enables external PSTN calls directly from the Microsoft Teams interface via Direct Routing.
- **SIP Trunks**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/sip-trunks.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/sip-trunks.html) — A modern, flexible replacement for traditional ISDN phone lines. Compatible with all major IP PBX systems.

## Key Pages

- **Pricing**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing.html) — Transparent, pay-as-you-go pricing for all services. No lock-in contracts.
- **Compare**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/compare.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/compare.html) — Side-by-side comparison of Click2Call versus traditional phone systems and other providers.
- **FAQ**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/faq.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/faq.html) — Comprehensive answers to frequently asked questions about our services.
- **Case Studies**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/case-studies.html) — Real-world examples of Australian businesses using Click2Call.
- **About**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/about.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/about.html) — About Click2Call, our team, and our mission.
- **Contact**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/contact.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/contact.html) — Contact Click2Call for sales enquiries and support.
- **Support**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/support.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/support.html) — Technical support resources and contact details.

## City & Regional Pages

Click2Call provides VoIP phone systems and Cloud PBX solutions to businesses across Australia, including:

- **VoIP Australia (National)**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-australia.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-australia.html)
- **VoIP Sydney**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-sydney.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-sydney.html) — Local 02 numbers. Nearby: Newcastle, Wollongong.
- **VoIP Melbourne**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-melbourne.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-melbourne.html) — Local 03 numbers.
- **VoIP Brisbane**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-brisbane.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-brisbane.html) — Local 07 numbers. Nearby: Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast.
- **VoIP Gold Coast**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-gold-coast.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-gold-coast.html) — Local 07 numbers. Nearby: Brisbane, Sunshine Coast.
- **VoIP Sunshine Coast**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-sunshine-coast.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-sunshine-coast.html) — Local 07 numbers. Nearby: Brisbane, Gold Coast.
- **VoIP Perth**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-perth.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-perth.html) — Local 08 numbers.
- **VoIP Adelaide**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-adelaide.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-adelaide.html) — Local 08 numbers.
- **VoIP Canberra**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-canberra.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-canberra.html) — Local 02 numbers.
- **VoIP Newcastle**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-newcastle.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-newcastle.html) — Local 02 numbers. Nearby: Sydney, Wollongong.
- **VoIP Wollongong**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-wollongong.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-wollongong.html) — Local 02 numbers. Nearby: Sydney, Newcastle.
- **VoIP Darwin**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-darwin.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-darwin.html) — Local 08 numbers.
- **VoIP Hobart**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-hobart.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-hobart.html) — Local 03 numbers.

## About the Business

- **Legal Name**: Bcom Services Pty Ltd
- **Trading Name**: Click2Call
- **ABN**: 92 636 893 108
- **Phone**: 1300 884 879
- **Email**: support@click2call.com.au
- **Coverage**: Australia-wide
- **Customer Portal**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au](https://portal.click2call.com.au)

## Pricing (ex GST, AUD) — Pay As You Go

Click2Call uses simple, transparent pay-as-you-go pricing with no lock-in contracts:

- **Cloud PBX Landline**: $10.00/month per line
- **Direct Dial Number (DDI)**: $5.00/month per number
- **Microsoft Teams Line**: $10.00/month per line
- **PBX Extensions**: Free
- **Channels**: 2 included; additional channels $3.00/month each
- **Outbound call rates**: from $0.10/min (Australia & New Zealand fixed)
- **30-day free trial** — no credit card required
- **Activation**: up to 24 hours after signup
- **SIP Trunks**: available on request
- Full details: [https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing.html)

## Customer Access

- **New Customer Signup**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au/join/](https://portal.click2call.com.au/join/) — Start a free trial. Phone systems activate within 24 hours of signup.
- **Existing Customer Login**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au/login.php](https://portal.click2call.com.au/login.php) — Manage your phone system, users, call routing, and settings.

## Help Centre

The Click2Call Help Centre provides step-by-step guides for managing your Cloud PBX phone system via the customer portal.

- **Help Centre Index**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/index.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/index.html) — Browse all how-to guides by category.

### Getting Started
- **Activating Your Account**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-activate-account.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-activate-account.html)
- **Adding Account Credit**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-account-credit.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-account-credit.html) — Click2Call operates on a pre-pay system; credit must be loaded before using paid features.

### Phone Numbers
- **Adding a Phone Number**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-phone-number.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-phone-number.html)
- **Porting an Existing Number**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-port-number.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-port-number.html)

### Extensions & Users
- **Adding an Extension**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-extension.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-extension.html)
- **Adding a New User**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-user.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-user.html)

### Phones & Devices
- **Adding a Desk Phone**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-desk-phone.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-desk-phone.html)
- **Setting Up a Softphone**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-softphone.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-softphone.html)

### Call Flows
- **Setting Up a Call Flow**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-call-flow.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-call-flow.html)
- **Creating a Ring Group**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-create-ring-group.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-create-ring-group.html)
- **Configuring Business Hours**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-configure-business-hours.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-configure-business-hours.html)
- **Setting Up Voicemail**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-voicemail.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-voicemail.html)
- **Viewing Call Recordings**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-view-call-recordings.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-view-call-recordings.html)

### Billing & Channels
- **Adding Channels**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-channels.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-channels.html)

### AI Features
- **Setting Up the AI Receptionist**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-receptionist.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-receptionist.html)

## Blog

The Click2Call blog covers business communications, VoIP, Cloud PBX, and AI telephony topics for Australian businesses.

- **Blog Index**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/index.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/index.html)

- AI in Business Phones: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/ai-in-business-phones.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/ai-in-business-phones.html)
- Business Phone System Cost Guide: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/business-phone-system-cost.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/business-phone-system-cost.html)

- 1300 Number Providers Australia: [https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/1300-number-providers.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/blog/1300-number-providers.html)
